title: Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:Taris_theater.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Defense line during the Mandalorian Wars.]]
The '''Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line''' was a boundary between [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusader]] forces in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] in [[3964 BBY]], during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. It was likely formed in [[3966 BBY/Legends|3966 BBY]] as a result of [[Lhosan Industries]] lobbying the Republic to defend [[Taris/Legends|Taris's]] resource [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].

The line was located near the planets of Taris, [[Jebble]], [[Vanquo]] and [[Tarnith]]. [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] was responsible for a portion of the line, as was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jimas Veltraa]].
